landing.title: ELITE BOOKER
landing.subtitle: MANAGE YOUR OWN WRESTLING UNIVERSE
landing.preset_wwe_desc: Preset with RAW, SD and NXT.
landing.wizard_step_1_desc: Name your new creation to identify it in the slots.
landing.wizard_step_2_desc: Use our JSON template and fill it with your data.
landing.wizard_step_2_tip: Tip: Verify IDs and ensure image paths match your local folder.
landing.wizard_step_3_desc: Select the .json file you have modified.
landing.wizard_step_4_desc: Link the local folder where you store images so they appear in the HUB.
landing.link_later_hint: If you don't link the folder now, you can do it later in Options.
landing.wizard_step_5_desc: You are about to create the universe {{name}}.

home.weekly_desc: Create and manage your weekly programming.
home.ple_desc: Create and manage your special events.
home.mgmt_shows_desc: Organize your calendar by creating weekly shows for each brand or special events. The system follows the current season and week.
home.mgmt_roster_desc: Manage your wrestlers' morale and injuries. Match results directly affect their stats and mood.
home.mgmt_titles_desc: Create title storylines and manage reigns. The system detects winners and automatically updates belt holders and history.
home.mgmt_config_desc: Personalize your experience in Options, linking your own visual assets or exporting your database for backups.

newspaper.no_editions: No previous editions available. Create your first show to see the news!
newspaper.welcome_headline: A NEW ERA BEGINS IN THE HUB!
newspaper.welcome_summary: Everything is ready for the start of the season. The roster is set, titles await owners, and you have total control. Who will become the next legends of your universe?
newspaper.welcome_news_2: The race for gold starts today.
newspaper.welcome_news_3: Prepare the first Main Event in history.
newspaper.welcome_injuries_1: The locker room is at 100% energy.
newspaper.welcome_injuries_2: No injuries recorded for the debut.
newspaper.welcome_injuries_3: Ready to put on a show.
newspaper.fallback_summary: A show for the history books that leaves fans wanting more.

no_contest: No Decision in the Main Event
The highly anticipated match between {{t1}} and {{t2}} ended without a clear winner in a shocking finale for {{show}}.
Officials could not maintain control and declared a 'No Contest' between {{t1}} and {{t2}}.
A battle so brutal between {{t1}} and {{t2}} that the referee was forced to stop it.
What a scandal! {{t1}} and {{t2}} irreparably destroyed everything in their path without regard for legal victory.
victory: In a display of superiority, {{winner}} secured victory over their opponents in the main event of {{show}}.
The crowd went wild when {{winner}} finished the job, receiving general applause after a great Main Event.
Against all odds and leaving their soul in the ring, {{winner}} prevailed over their rivals, closing {{show}} masterfully.
The main event did not disappoint, concluding with a spectacular contest where {{winner}} managed to raise their arm in victory.

event_creation.min_matches_error: You must have at least 5 matches on the card to save the show.
event_creation.show_exists_error: A show for {{brand}} in Season {{season}}, Week {{week}} already exists!
event_creation.save_failed: Failed to save show. Check console.
event_creation.video_placeholder: Write what happens in the video package...
event_creation.vacante_error: A 'VACANTE' wrestler cannot participate in a Title Match.

options.title: OPTIONS & CONFIGURATION
options.cloudinary_tip: Use Cloudinary URLs for better loading times.
options.injury_desc: Enable or disable random injuries after shows.
options.morale_desc: Enable or disable wrestler morale progression.
options.immutable_desc: Configured at the start of the game (Immutable).
options.local_assets_desc: Link a local folder to load images without modifying code.
options.asset_note: Ensure the structure is visuals/Wrestlers, visuals/Brands, etc.
options.persistence_desc: Manage your game persistence. Save your progress in internal slots.
options.delete_slot_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this save slot?
options.reset_game_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset the current game? All unsaved data will be lost.
options.load_instruction: To load a saved game, go back to the Main Menu.

archive.title: SHOW ARCHIVE
archive.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this show permanently?
